1.description: select buildings in Kristiansand with geometry and kommunenummer and kommunenavn

2.description: select 200-year storm surge geometries (stormflo200ar_klimaarna) with geometry prefiltered to Kristiansand bbox

3.description: find buildings within 50 m of stormflo features and compute distance, sort and limit 10

4.description: get municipality and kommunenummer for Kristiansand to confirm filter

5.description: get county name for buildings by spatial join with fylke
